_provenance.arm: Arm 1 -- scalar-bridging (DWUG human-rated usage-similarity midpoints), REUSED UNCHANGED
_provenance.note: MANIFEST ONLY -- references the FROZEN lexical-bridging-context-v1 DWUG stratum by sha256. NO corpus text here (DWUG/CCOHA is CC BY-ND and gitignored). To present an item to a model at run time, the run session stages the gitignored fulltext exactly as the lexical leg does (experiments/designs/lexical-bridging-context-v1/prep.py), then reads item_id + class from the staged fulltext jsonl. This arm's items are NOT re-authored; they are the lexical leg's already-frozen stratum, reused under the shared instrument. Usage-similarity cap inherited.

stratum_csv.pool: 48 DWUG pairs (clear-same 9 / bridging 24 / clear-different 15), ~20 lemmas; rater floor human_n>=3

class_map_to_shared_instrument.bridging: ambiguous (the moment-pole / disjunctive-analogue test class for the SCALAR arm; expected handling tested per C1 on decline rate)
class_map_to_shared_instrument.clear-same: clear-same (expected non-elevated decline, high confidence; C3 control)
class_map_to_shared_instrument.clear-different: clear-different (expected non-elevated decline, high confidence; C3 control)
